title: Simunye thrashes Paris United in regionals
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Zama Gagu","contributorName":"Zama Gagu","contributorDate":"Wednesday, 04 February 2026, 15:46"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"In the second half, Simunye continued to play with confidence and Ntlaba completed his hat-trick."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SOCCER NEWS - Lawaaikamp’s Simunye FC delivered a commanding performance on Sunday 1 February, defeating Paris United 4-0 in a Safa Eden Regional Men’s League fixture at the Lawaaikamp Stadium in George.","html":"SOCCER NEWS - Lawaaikamp’s Simunye FC delivered a commanding performance on Sunday 1 February, defeating Paris United 4-0 in a Safa Eden Regional Men’s League fixture at the Lawaaikamp Stadium in George."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The home side dominated from the outset, with lanky forward Yamkela Ntlaba - a former Imizamo Yethu High School player - leading the charge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He opened the scoring after just five minutes, slotting home to make it 1-0. Paris United defended resiliently early on, but struggled to create clear chances - one effort even sailed right over the bar.","html":"He opened the scoring after just five minutes, slotting home to make it 1-0. Paris United defended resiliently early on, but struggled to create clear chances - one effort even sailed right over the bar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Simunye doubled their lead midway through the first half when Ntlaba beat Paris goalkeeper Abongile Booysen for his second goal.","html":"Simunye doubled their lead midway through the first half when Ntlaba beat Paris goalkeeper Abongile Booysen for his second goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Paris pushed forward, and winger Liyema Tukwayo looked dangerous on the left flank, but he spurned a golden one-on-one opportunity, firing straight at Simunye keeper Thatho Maboea.","html":"Paris pushed forward, and winger Liyema Tukwayo looked dangerous on the left flank, but he spurned a golden one-on-one opportunity, firing straight at Simunye keeper Thatho Maboea."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Moments before half-time, Nandile Jacobs capitalised on a counter-attack to make it 3-0, piling pressure on the visitors. The first half ended with Simunye firmly in control.","html":"Moments before half-time, Nandile Jacobs capitalised on a counter-attack to make it 3-0, piling pressure on the visitors. The first half ended with Simunye firmly in control."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the second half, both teams attacked more openly down the flanks, but Paris United failed to find a breakthrough. Simunye continued to play with confidence and Ntlaba completed his hat-trick to seal a 4-0 victory and secure maximum points.","html":"In the second half, both teams attacked more openly down the flanks, but Paris United failed to find a breakthrough. Simunye continued to play with confidence and Ntlaba completed his hat-trick to seal a 4-0 victory and secure maximum points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams remain anchored at the bottom of the log, battling to climb into the top eight.","html":"Both teams remain anchored at the bottom of the log, battling to climb into the top eight."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Speaking after the match, hat-trick hero Ntlaba expressed his delight at performing in front of home supporters.","html":"Speaking after the match, hat-trick hero Ntlaba expressed his delight at performing in front of home supporters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It feels good to be back here,” he said. “Scoring against Paris means a lot, and I believe we can turn things around as a team. We’re at the bottom now, but we’ll fight to improve our position on the table.”","html":"“It feels good to be back here,” he said. “Scoring against Paris means a lot, and I believe we can turn things around as a team. We’re at the bottom now, but we’ll fight to improve our position on the table.”"}]

Simunye continued to play with confidence and Ntlaba completed his hat-trick to seal a 4-0 victory and secure maximum points.","html":"In the second half, both teams attacked more openly down the flanks, but Paris United failed to find a breakthrough. Simunye continued to play with confidence and Ntlaba completed his hat-trick to seal a 4-0 victory and secure maximum points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams remain anchored at the bottom of the log, battling to climb into the top eight.","html":"Both teams remain anchored at the bottom of the log, battling to climb into the top eight."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Speaking after the match, hat-trick hero Ntlaba expressed his delight at performing in front of home supporters.","html":"Speaking after the match, hat-trick hero Ntlaba expressed his delight at performing in front of home supporters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It feels good to be back here,” he said. “Scoring against Paris means a lot, and I believe we can turn things around as a team. We’re at the bottom now, but we’ll fight to improve our position on the table.”","html":"“It feels good to be back here,” he said. “Scoring against Paris means a lot, and I believe we can turn things around as a team. We’re at the bottom now, but we’ll fight to improve our position on the table.”"}]

images.alt: Simunye thrashes Paris United in regionals

author: Zama Gagu
teaser: In the second half, Simunye continued to play with confidence and Ntlaba completed his hat-trick.
featuredCaption: Sihle van Rensburg (right) of Simunye FC battles with Paris United players Inathi Mabele (centre) and Lithimna Bokoda (left) for possession of the ball. Photo: Zama Gagu
